lens: The pragmatist maintainer who ships and debugs this at 3am: heavily weight simplicity, debuggability, migrationCost, notOverEngineered; punish cleverness that doesn't earn its keep and any big-bang.

scores.note: Simplest mental model: freeze inputs, pure Decide, apply. Replay-from-seed + flight recorder deletes the 5124-LOC WAL crutch. Differential-oracle-first is the safest migration move. Rejects generics; respects S35.

Correct diagnosis: bugs are write-side; ownership protects un-rewritten code. But bundles 3 proof types + SSA tables + finalizers + Rev-CAS + worker-pool-with-exclusivity. CAS-on-Dolt is load-bearing; new concurrency is a 3am risk.

Sealed one-method-per-state handler is excellent, compiler-forced totality, dissolves the god function. But OTP supervision tree is ceremony for ~8 goroutines, and per-entity-vs-batch parity is admitted-hard with a lingering shim.

4-type-param generic + effect-capability assertions = hardest to debug; one engine is one blast radius. Must port all six domains, chassis built speculatively first. Unifies what S35 said keep separate; 'seventh reconciler' is YAGNI.

bestIdeasToGraft: T4 finalizer-gated close: FinalizerRuntimeTeardown stamped at creation + CloseProof mintable only from an empty-finalizer status. Slots into T3's Applier as the sole close path and kills the pane-leak/orphan-close class by construction, protecting even legacy write paths.

T4 spec/status field-group split with single-owner whole-value appliers (SSA-lite). Directly answers T3's own admitted risk that Snapshot ossifies into a god-struct, and gives the Applier a disciplined write side so the ~250 raw metadata sites can't betray a pure Decide during the long migration.

T2 sealed one-method-per-state handler interface. Make Decide's state dispatch a compiler-forced interface so adding a LifecycleState without handling it fails to build — belt-and-suspenders with T3's exhaustiveness lint, stronger than lint alone.

The shared mechanical kit everyone converges on: marker-last Commit, write-ahead Intent pair (attempted->confirmed) as the ONLY effectful entry point, liveness Witness gating destructive effects, and a single Quarantine/Guard replacing the 5 tracker singletons. Keep T3's cleanest versions.
T4 Rev-CAS on status writes where storage supports it (fall back to convergence-by-idempotence on Dolt) to structurally prevent stale-snapshot clobber.

Ship the confirmed standalone fix FIRST, independent of any migration: route convergence's startup Reconciler (reconcile.go bare SetMetadata sequences) through the existing handler.go:789 commit() helper. Smallest, highest-confidence, real-drift win.

The differential-oracle / parity-pin discipline (legacy vs new on identical seeded worlds, action streams diffed via the existing trace taxonomy) made non-negotiable before any behavior flip — T3's Stage 2 centerpiece, the single biggest 3am-safety property.
verdict: Build on T3's spine: pure total Decide(Snapshot)->Plan, observe-once, a thin Applier, and DST replay-from-seed. It is the only design that is genuinely SIMPLER to reason about (not differently complex), deletes the 5124-LOC WAL crutch instead of maintaining it, and de-risks migration by proving the harness against the legacy god function BEFORE changing behavior. Then graft T4's finalizer-gated close and spec/status single-owner write discipline to guard the write side T3 leaves exposed, and T2's compiler-forced per-state handler for totality. Avoid T1's six-domain generic and T4's worker-pool concurrency.

lens: Reliability/SRE, military-grade: weight testability, errorElimination, and crash/fault correctness heavily. Ask "structurally impossible AND provable via deterministic simulation, or just relocated?" Type-system guarantees beat lints; new failure surface is a regression.

scores.note: DST-as-proof is the thesis; per-effect crash injector is enumerable-per-plan, the gold standard. Reuses confirmed landed core, least new surface. Ding: leans on lints (determinism/exhaustiveness) where types would be stronger.

Best crash-correctness: recovery=steady-state (boot is first tick) kills the recovery-only bug class. Sealed per-state handler = compile-time totality > T3's lint. Owned token kills two-writer structurally. Supervision tree risks ceremony.

Broadest structural set, laws+VOPR inherited six times (verified-kernel pattern). But one-engine-one-blast-radius; generics-at-edges awkward; generic pure Diff makes hidden judgment easier to smuggle. Highest-variance bet.

Best write-side structural eliminations that hold DURING migration (protects ~250 write sites). But Rev-CAS depends on uncertain Dolt CAS, SSA has an external-bd-write bypass, weakest simulation story, most primitives.

bestIdeasToGraft: Witness-typed destruction (all four): promote the ALREADY-PRESENT boolean C5 guard (r.observed && r.live) to an unconstructible-without-proof type; kills the confirmed live destructive-close class (session_reconciler.go:1538 err->providerAlive=false->rollback) at compile time. Highest-value graft.

T3's 'point the trace WAL forwards' + per-effect crash-injection DST as the proof system, replayable from seed+SHA. The 5,124-LOC WAL proves inputs are finitely enumerable; reuse it as the simulator, delete the crutch.

T2's recovery=steady-state (boot is the first tick, crash-only re-derivation): eliminates the recovery-path-only bug class and deletes the confirmed 6-phase startup retry ladder (city_runtime.go:445-648).

T2's sealed per-state handler interface for COMPILE-TIME totality (omitting a state = build failure everywhere) - structurally stronger than T3's exhaustiveness lint; kills unknown-state-skip-forever (#2085/#2389).

T4's SSA single-owner field appliers + finalizer-gated close: write-side protection that holds DURING migration (T3's decide-centric spine leaves ~250 raw write sites exposed until late); finalizer solves pane-leak AND orphan-close from one mechanism.

T1's marker-last Commit + write-ahead Intent pair as SHARED mechanical helpers (S35-faithful: share mechanics not state machines) - routed through so the confirmed convergence bypass (reconcile.go:496-511) becomes uncompilable.
T1's Outcome sealed sum to delete the ErrControlPending/errors.Is dispatch multiplexing - retry/quarantine/fail as a closed value, not smuggled onto the error channel.
Clock injection into CityRuntime + no-I/O determinism lint on the Decide package as Stage 0 (T3, correctly sequenced) - confirmed prerequisite, since city_runtime.go is full of raw time.Now().
Owned[EntityKey]/per-key exclusivity token (T2/T4) to make the two-writer class structurally impossible while still allowing safe cross-key parallelism (the K8s workqueue pattern).
verdict: Build on T3's spine: pure total Decide + deterministic simulation AS the proof system - its 'point-the-WAL-forwards' insight is code-confirmed, it reuses the landed deriveConvergeActions, and adds the least new failure surface. Graft T2's compile-time sealed-handler totality and recovery=steady-state, plus T4's single-owner field appliers + finalizer-gated close so the ~250 write sites are protected during migration. Witness-typed destruction is non-negotiable in all.

lens: Purist architect: weights invariantFit, the primitive-test (atomicity + more-useful-as-models-improve + judgment-out-of-Go), conceptual integrity, S35 fidelity, and no-premature-abstraction above raw error-count or migration cleverness.

scores.note: Refuses the generic (most S35-faithful: shares only 2-impl mechanics); one pure total Decide is the single auditable judgment surface. Reuses trace-WAL structure instead of a foreign metaphor. Weak flank: no write-side field ownership.

Bead-is-heap / crash-only recovery deeply matches 'work persists'; sealed per-state interface makes unknown-state uncompilable — strongest single guarantee. But supervision-tree ceremony is borrowed apparatus and tables can smuggle policy (self-admitted, Go can't check).

Sharpest diagnosis (bugs are write-side) and best graftable primitive (single-owner appliers + finalizer-gated close). But imports the most K8s apparatus, bundles needed jitter with an unneeded worker pool, and Rev-CAS fights Gas City's idempotent-convergence grain; field-ownership unenforceable against external bd writes.

Highest error-elimination ceiling but the over-engineering candidate: a mandatory 4-param generic forcing six dissimilar loops through one contract violates 'no premature abstraction'. Its mechanical primitives (Commit/Intent/Witness/Fence) ship as a kit WITHOUT the engine; generic Diff also widens the hidden-judgment surface (self-flagged).

bestIdeasToGraft: Witness-gated destruction (DeathCertificate/AbsenceWitness/DeadWitness): destructive Close/Teardown/Reap effects carry a proof field mintable ONLY from a positively-confirmed-dead probe — consensus across all four, kills the swallowed-probe→orphan-close class (gc-hz0nu, #2987) at compile time. Non-negotiable.

T4's single-owner whole-value appliers (SSA-lite: one applier per gc.spec.*/gc.status.* field group, no per-key SetMetadata) — the decisive write-side fix that protects the ~250 raw write sites a pure core alone cannot; graft into T3's Applier to close its one real weakness.

T4's finalizer-gated close (CloseProof mintable only from an empty finalizer set; teardown finalizer removable only with a DeathCertificate) — makes 'bead closed while pane lives' structurally impossible even for legacy paths.

T2's sealed per-state handler interface + typed StateUnrecognized{raw,since} decode — makes unknown/skip-forever UNCOMPILABLE and forces a TTL/quarantine+event arm; strongest single guarantee, graft into the state decoder.

Write-ahead Intent pair (attempted-marker before I/O, confirm after) generalized beyond priming to start/close/rollback — consensus; solves at-most-once vs unbounded-at-least-once once, by type flow not review.
Commit marker-last as the ONLY write path + a vet/lint gate banning bare SetMetadata on reconcile paths — kills the reconcile.go:496-511 drift I verified in the 'sound blueprint' itself.
T3's determinism lint on the pure package (forbid time.Now/math-rand/io/net/goroutines; Cells a sorted slice, never a map) — makes replay a structural property, not an aspiration.

simworld DST: seeded memstore+fake provider+sim clock with a crash-between-adjacent-effects injector, safety checked every step, liveness after quiescence, replay from seed+SHA — consensus (T2/T3/T4), the military-grade testability spine; pair with a differential oracle diffing the new core against the legacy god function via the existing trace taxonomy as the parity pin.

T2's 'bead IS the process heap → crash-only recovery = boot = steady-state' framing — collapses startup/recovery/steady into one code path and deletes the 6-phase startup ladder; the most Gas-City-aligned recovery model.

Enqueue-only arrival API (spawn/adopt/resume/drift/rollback can ONLY enqueue a key; all metadata writes are Diff-emitted whole-field-group effects) — from T1/T4; structurally removes the per-arrival-path stamping gaps where the #3872 class lives.

Flight recorder: replace the 5,124-LOC trace WAL (segments/CRC/quarantine/arms) with a ~300-LOC {Snapshot,Plan}/{Observation,Actions} JSONL, `gc trace` reduced to a projection over it — consensus; deletes the debugging crutch that only exists because the code is otherwise undebuggable.

The S35-correct mechanics-kit boundary (share ONLY helpers with two real implementations — Commit, Fence/CAS, idempotency keys — and keep every domain's state machine separate), explicitly REJECTING T1's mandatory generic Engine.
verdict: Build on T3's spine: one pure, total, lint-gated Decide(Snapshot)→Plan is the single auditable place to prove no judgment or role leaked into Go, and it refuses the generic — the most S35-faithful, least-over-engineered reading (share only 2-impl mechanics, keep state machines separate). Then harden its one weak flank, the write side, by grafting T4's single-owner appliers + finalizer-gated close + proof-carrying destruction and T2's compile-time state totality and bead-as-heap crash-only recovery. Reject T1's mandatory generic engine: a shared-mechanics kit already captures its error-elimination without straitjacketing six domains.
